name: Grayscale Bitcoin Cash Trust (BCH)
summary: PART I Item 1. B usiness Overview of the Trust and the Shares Grayscale Bitcoin Cash Trust (BCH) (formerly known as Bitcoin Cash Investment Trust) (the Trust) is a Delaware Statutory Trust that was formed on January 26, 2018 by the filing of the Certificate of Trust with the Delaware Secretary of State in accordance with the provisions of the Delaware Statutory Trust Act. The Trusts purpose is to hold Bitcoin Cash (BCH). Bitcoin Cash, an alternative software implementation of Bitcoin, was create...
